name: Reactions not migrated
description: Message reactions are not migrated in Teams to Teams migration.

name: Some stickers as links
description: Some stickers may be migrated as links rather than native stickers.

name: Translated messages as original
description: Translated messages appear in original language after migration.

name: Messages posted to multiple channels as normal
description: Messages posted to multiple channels are migrated as normal single-channel posts.

name: Edited label not migrated
description: The edited message label/indicator is not migrated.

name: Channel message not migrating when posted from thread
description: Channel messages posted from a thread may not migrate correctly.

name: Unmapped user mentions with admin name
description: Unmapped user mentions may display with admin name.

name: Replies in DMs as separate messages
description: Replies in DMs may appear as separate messages rather than threaded.

name: Team and channel mentions as normal text
description: Team and channel mentions may appear as normal text after migration.

name: Archived channels as standard
description: Archived channels may be migrated as standard (non-archived) channels.

name: Reaction emojis as standard Unicode
description: Reaction emojis may appear as standard Unicode rather than native reactions.
